debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
l1 l2 : List α
idx1 idx2 : ℕ
hidx1 : idx1 < l1.length
hidx2 : idx2 < l2.length
heq : l1[idx1] = l2[idx2]
hperm : l1.Perm l2
⊢ (l1.eraseIdx idx1).Perm (l2.eraseIdx idx2)

proof:
have h_aux (l : List α) (i : Nat) (hi : i < l.length) : (l[i] :: l.eraseIdx i).Perm l := by
        induction i generalizing l with
        | zero =>
          cases l with
          | nil => contradiction
          | cons hd tl => simp [List.eraseIdx]
        | succ i IH =>
          cases l with
          | nil => contradiction
          | cons hd tl =>
            simp [List.eraseIdx]
            exact (List.Perm.swap _ _ _).trans ((IH _ (by simpa using hi)).cons _)
      have h := (h_aux l1 idx1 hidx1).trans (hperm.trans (h_aux l2 idx2 hidx2).symm)
      rw [heq, List.perm_cons] at h
      exact h
successful_attempts:

        induction i generalizing l with
        | zero =>
          cases l with
          | nil => contradiction
          | cons hd tl => simp [List.eraseIdx]
        | succ i IH =>
          cases l with
          | nil => contradiction
          | cons hd tl =>
            simp [List.eraseIdx]
            exact (List.Perm.swap _ _ _).trans ((IH _ (by simpa using hi)).cons _)
      have h := (h_aux l1 idx1 hidx1).trans (hperm.trans (h_aux l2 idx2 hidx2).symm)
      rw [heq, List.perm_cons] at h
      exact h
